title: Work Penalty
description: Display the repair cost value in the item tooltip.
body:
Simple client-side mod that allows you to see the work penalty / repair cost of an enchanted item or book.  

> **Advanced tooltips must be enable in order for the tooltip to be displayed.**

![Example image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca8fc260058131f7f4daea0423aeed559905ebf4.png)

**Source code: [github.com/LINCKODE/work-penalty](https://github.com/LINCKODE/work-penalty)**  
**License: [GPL 3]([https://github.com/LINCKODE/work-penalty/blob/main/LICENSE.txt](https://github.com/LINCKODE/work-penalty/blob/main/LICENSE.txt))**
